title: Garry Kasparov's Spectacular Scotch Game (5-game compilation)
games_in_order: 01 Kasparov vs Jan Timman, Corus (Wijk aan Zee) 2000
04 Kasparov vs Ivan Sokolov, Yerevan Olympiad 1996
05 Kasparov vs Wolfgang Unzicker, Zurich (Korchnoi Birthday) 2001
notes: SammyChess's punchy, fast, superlative-driven delivery covering five Kasparov Scotch wins in order (a deliberate contrast to Agadmator's calm storytelling). The matching PGNs are numbered to that presentation order. Auto-caption transcript, so some names are garbled: 'Yan Teimman' = Timman, 'Yvon Sakalov' = Ivan Sokolov, 'Wolf Gang Ununzer' = Unzicker. Caveat: Kasparov has two Adams Scotch wins in the database; #02 is the 1999 Sarajevo game — the video's exact Adams game couldn't be 100% confirmed from the auto-caption (swap to the 2000 KasparovChess rapid if it turns out to be that one).
